attributes.content:
## Overview

The Coupon card gives the workspace a structured home for discount code with type (percentage/fixed), validity period, usage limits, and applicable products.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Coupon acts as a canonical operational record. It keeps important facts, state changes, timestamps, and linked parties in one place so downstream workflows, approvals, and reporting can all rely on the same source of truth.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Product]]** -- Product can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Coupon.
- **[[Order]]** -- Order can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Coupon.
- **[[Invoice]]** -- Invoice can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Coupon.
- **[[Deal]]** -- Deal can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Coupon.
- **[[Contact]]** -- Coupon often needs a person-level reference for ownership, communication, or accountability.
- **[[Organization]]** -- Coupon frequently sits inside an account, company, or team-level relationship context.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Coupon as the structured home for discount code with type (percentage/fixed), validity period, usage limits, and applicable products and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Coupon when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Coupon stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.
